name: allium sativum
title: allium sativum benefits
description: Allium sativum relieves anxiety by reducing feelings of worry, nervousness, and fear, allowing individuals to feel calm and centered. This benefit is important as excessive anxiety can lead to sleep disturbances, decreased productivity, and impaired relationships, making it essential for maintaining overall well-being and quality of life.
